title: cotoneaster racemiflorus var. nummularius
intro: Cotoneaster racemiflorus var. nummularius, also known as the coin-leaved cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub species in the Rosaceae family, characterized by its small, rounded leaves resembling coins. Traditionally, Cotoneaster racemiflorus var. nummularius has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cotoneaster racemiflorus var. nummularius, including infusions and decoctions, have been used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
